title: best pvp modpack by WPG_Gamerzz
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on performance, quality-of-life improvements, and useful utilities like minimaps, schematics, better UI, and optimizations for smooth gameplay on low-end PCs.
body:
![MODPACK BY WPG_Gamerzz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fb7d8ccc043442156da9d6fd726f770c298e824.jpeg)
# Overview

This is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack designed to improve gameplay with performance optimizations, useful tools, and quality-of-life features while keeping the vanilla experience mostly intact.

The goal of this modpack is to provide smoother performance, better visuals, and helpful utilities without drastically changing the core gameplay.

It is especially suitable for low-end and mid-range PCs.

## ⚡ Performance Improvements

Sodium

Lithium

FerriteCore

EntityCulling

Clumps

FastItemFrames

These help reduce memory usage and improve rendering performance.

### 🗺 Utility & Gameplay Tools

This modpack also includes useful gameplay tools such as:

Xaero's Minimap & World Map – for navigation and exploration

Litematica – build and share schematics easily

Shulker Box Tooltip – preview contents of shulker boxes

Better Statistics & Better Advancements – improved information UI

Chat Heads / Chat Improvements – better chat interface

These mods make gameplay more convenient without changing the vanilla mechanics.

## 🎨 Visual Improvements

Some mods improve the visual experience while keeping the vanilla style.

Included visual improvements:

Continuity (connected textures)

Better Grass

AppleSkin (food saturation HUD)

Health Indicators

# 🧰 Additional Utilities

Other helpful mods include:

Mouse Tweaks

Zoomify

Freecam

Inventory and UI improvements

These make building, exploring, and managing items easier.

### 🎯 Goal of the Modpack

The goal of this modpack is to provide:

Better performance

Improved quality of life

Useful building and exploration tools

A mostly vanilla-friendly experience

## 📌 Notes

Designed for Fabric Loader

Best used with Minecraft 1.21.11 , 1.21.10 , and 1.21.8

Includes a few optional resource packs
